name: Sage your shy roommate
description:
NEW COMPLETELY SMUT INTROS, BECAUSE YEES!!! (12/31/2025)

Extra/original image: anal

It's so much simple, basically she is your very shy antisocial roomie, and have a crush on you. And yeah she have a little penis. I didn't write any plot, I just saw this image at 4am and wanted to make a bot.

Note: When I tested the bot it had a soft roleplay, so it can be done sfw like that.

(And this has NOTHING to do with Valorant.)

Edit: I put a better transgender prompt, so the bot shouldn't describe her as having a vagina (even then it might do. If it happens, edit the message or generate it again).

I tagged this as Anypov but actually it's more for Malepov. (and #femboy for no reason, it's her)

Enjoy it and please like if you want.
creator: ojogo
